component.name: NovelIDE
component.summary: An IDE for novels, with a Codex that keeps your story straight

description.p: NovelIDE treats a novel like a software project: manuscripts are plain Markdown, world knowledge lives in a schema-driven Codex, and a local NLP engine cross-checks the two — flagging a dead character who acts again, suggesting facts your prose states but the Codex doesn't record, and spotting new characters you forgot to catalogue.

Plan at series, book, and chapter level with live word counts, plot-thread matrices, and plan-vs-manuscript checks. Built for single novels and multi-book series with shared worldbuilding. Fully offline: no accounts, no API calls.
First packaged release: Codex, editor with hover cards and consistency detection, planning views, spellcheck, and the optional local transformer tier.
